macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Stock Market Futures Surge Higher on March 23
items.summary: Futures for the Nasdaq 100, Dow Jones Industrial Average, and S&P 500 rose sharply by 1.79%, 1.87%, and 1.98% respectively at 7:40 AM, signaling a strong open amid positive market sentiment.

items.title: Wall Street Stocks Jump as Oil Prices Ease After Global Losses
items.summary: Stock markets on Wall Street surged following severe losses elsewhere, with oil prices easing, boosted by hopes rising after Trump's announcement.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: CLARITY Act Stablecoin Deal Moves to Capitol Hill Review
items.summary: Crypto industry leaders met with the Senate Banking Committee to review a stablecoin yield compromise that unblocked the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act. Bank representatives are scheduled to follow on Tuesday, with details of the agreement remaining confidential.

items.title: Bitcoin Rises $1,801 in Daily Trading
items.summary: Bitcoin traded at $70,599.53, marking a $1,801.64 increase from the previous day, though it remains approximately $15,460 below its price one year ago.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Verily Raises $300M in AI Healthcare Funding
items.summary: Verily secured $300 million in funding, signaling strong investment in AI pipelines for healthcare. The raise accompanies Google Fitbit's advancements in record linkage.

items.title: Visma Launches Smartscan Premium with BERT-Powered NLP Innovation
items.summary: Visma's Machine Learning Assets team released Smartscan Premium and AutoSuggest, leveraging advanced natural language processing with BERT technology. The company is shifting to agentic workflows for autonomous AI execution.

items.title: Purdue Team Develops AI Biosensors for Corn Crop Pathogen Detection
items.summary: Purdue researchers are deploying AI-driven field sensors and novel biosensors to detect pathogenic DNA, RNA, and plant stress markers in corn crops. The project aims to minimize datasets for scalable biosecurity.

items.title: AI Renaissance Trends: Human-Centric Intelligence and Multimodal AI
items.summary: Emerging trends highlight human-centric AI aligned with cognitive processes, enhanced NLP, large language models, and multimodal integration of text, images, and audio.

items.title: GovAI and Brookings Study Maps AI Job Exposure Across 350 Occupations
items.summary: New research measures AI's impact on jobs by task efficiency and worker transition ease, identifying most and least vulnerable roles amid rising workforce AI adoption.

items.title: Mastercard AI Leader Highlights Shift to Transformer Models and AI Agents
items.summary: AI has evolved to deep learning with transformers, large language models, and autonomous agents for fraud detection, risk scoring, and end-to-end task management.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Xbox Partner Preview Showcase Announced for March 26
items.summary: Microsoft revealed an upcoming Xbox Partner Preview on March 26 featuring updates on Stranger Than Heaven from Ryu Ga Gotoku, S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Heart of Chornobyl, The Expanse: Osiris Reborn, plus world premieres and Game Pass announcements from partners like Sega and Owlcat Games.

items.title: This Week's Key Game Releases: Life is Strange: Reunion and More on March 26
items.summary: Major releases this week include Life is Strange: Reunion and its Twin Pack on March 26, alongside Switch 2 ports of Super Mario Bros. Wonder and Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O., Screamer racing game, and Mega Man Star Force Legacy Collection on March 27.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Officially Announced
items.summary: Ubisoft's new franchise head Jean Gudeson announced Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced, confirming long-rumored remake, alongside AC Unity 60fps update, ongoing Project Invictus multiplayer, and end of support for AC Shadows.

items.title: Minecraft Dungeons 2 Surprise Announced for 2026
items.summary: Developer Double Eleven and Microsoft suddenly revealed Minecraft Dungeons 2, a sequel to the 2020 dungeon crawler spinoff, launching in 2026 on PC, PS5, Switch/Switch 2, and Xbox Series.

items.title: Konami Delists Metal Gear Solid 4 and Peace Walker
items.summary: Konami delisted previous versions of Metal Gear Solid 4 and Peace Walker ahead of their modern release in the Marvel MaXimum Collection on March 27, while MGS Master Collection Vol. 1 received a 3.0 update with Switch 2 enhancements.

items.title: Hellraiser: Revival ESRB Rated with Switch 2 Port Revealed
items.summary: Saber Interactive’s Hellraiser: Revival received an ESRB rating, signaling imminent launch and unexpectedly revealing a Nintendo Switch 2 port.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Elon Musk Launches Terafab Chip Factory in Texas for Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI
items.summary: Elon Musk announced Terafab, a $20 billion-plus semiconductor fab in Austin, Texas, to produce custom chips for EVs, Optimus robots, and high-performance computing, addressing global chip shortages.

items.title: Anduril Secures Up to $20 Billion U.S. Army Contract
items.summary: Defense tech startup Anduril landed a five-to-ten-year enterprise contract with the U.S. Army worth up to $20 billion, consolidating existing orders and enabling faster future deals, including a new $87 million task order.

items.title: Linux Foundation Receives $12.5 Million Funding Boost from Big Tech
items.summary: The Linux Foundation secured $12.5 million in grants from Google, Microsoft, Anthropic, and OpenAI to enhance open-source software security amid rising vulnerabilities from AI-generated code.

items.title: PSN Service Outage Resolved on PS5 and PS4
items.summary: PlayStation Network experienced a brief outage but services are returning online for PS5 and PS4 users.
